items.title: Analysts Lower Expectations for UnitedHealth (UNH) Following Weak Guidance
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is included among the 14 Best Warren Buffett Dividend Stocks to Buy. UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is going through a difficult stretch, with the stock dropping nearly 14% since the start of 2026, reflecting growing concern among investors. The company reported its fourth-quarter results on January 27, and the numbers did […]
